name: revoke.cash
description: Take back control of your wallet and stay safe by revoking token approvals you granted on Ethereum and over 100 other networks.

scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @revoke.cash/core typecheck && yarn workspace @revoke.cash/backend typecheck && yarn workspace web typecheck && yarn workspace @revoke.cash/indexer typecheck && yarn workspace @revoke.cash/auto-revoke-executor typecheck && yarn workspace @revoke.cash/video typecheck
scripts.translations:update: yarn workspace web translations:update && yarn lint:fix
scripts.allow-scripts: yarn workspaces foreach --all exec allow-scripts run
scripts.allow-scripts:check: yarn workspaces foreach --all exec allow-scripts check
